lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be functional. Both the interior and exterior show extensive wear and damage.

Looking for a reliable and well-cared-for ride? This car is in great shape and ready for its next owner! It has been consistently maintained and runs beautifully. While you might find a few minor signs of normal use, the overall condition is solid and dependable. It’s a fantastic choice for anyone who wants a quality vehicle that is ready to hit the road!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently requires significant mechanical work, as the engine runs roughly and there is a persistent leak in the cooling system. The transmission also shows signs of hesitation during gear changes. Cosmetically, the car has extensive exterior rust, several deep dents, and the clear coat is peeling across most panels. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. This would be an ideal project for a mechanic or someone looking for a parts car.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic work to be safely driven. The engine currently runs but has a heavy internal knock, and the transmission exhibits severe slipping when shifting. There are also noticeable fluid leaks from the engine bay and the brakes feel spongy. Visually, the car has significant rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells, and the paint is heavily oxidized. Inside, the seats are torn, and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended for parts or a complete restoration project.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear on the upholstery and carpet. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical care and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience and proven reliability. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. A sophisticated choice for those who demand quality and lasting value.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home! This car has been super dependable for me and is still in really solid shape, perfect for someone who needs a reliable daily driver. It's been well-loved and drives like a dream, so you're definitely getting a great deal here. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, the drivetrain offers exceptional mechanical feedback. This example has undergone essential preventative maintenance, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS system refresh to ensure valvetrain timing precision. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein dampers and poly-bushing upgrades, maintaining the sharp turn-in and lateral stability synonymous with the M-badge. A mechanically sound, driver-spec icon ready for the canyons.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers the perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, expected road wear, while the cabin remains a smoke-free sanctuary with supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of premium electronics. Mechanically, it stands in strong standing; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and all scheduled services have been documented. It has been garage-kept and recently detailed, ensuring it is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence. From the responsive handling to the quiet cabin at highway speeds, this car represents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality pre-owned experience.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating mechanical integrity, the automobile offers a refined driving experience consistent with its premium lineage. While exhibiting minor aesthetic characteristics commensurate with its history, the exterior remains impressive, and the interior cabin provides a sophisticated, well-preserved environment. Fully inspected to ensure performance standards, this unit exemplifies reliable engineering and lasting value for its next proprietor.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a prime example of sustained mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and roadworthiness. Offering a balanced synthesis of value and quality, this vehicle stands as a testament to responsible ownership and remains prepared for immediate service. It is an ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber transport solution.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car! It’s been super well-loved and is in really great shape for its next adventure. It runs like a total dream and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or headed out on a road trip, you're going to love being behind the wheel of this one! Come take it for a spin!

This 2008 Porsche Cayman S is a masterclass in mid-engine balance. Powered by a 3.4L naturally aspirated flat-six, it delivers linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, supported by a precision-tuned McPherson strut suspension that offers telepathic feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. Recent maintenance ensures the VarioCam Plus system operates flawlessly across the rev range. Equipped with four-piston monobloc calipers and cross-drilled rotors, the braking performance is fade-resistant and firm. This driver-focused machine features a healthy drivetrain and a clean underside, optimized for lateral grip and high-RPM engagement.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Minor surface scratches. Runs well.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and comfort, having been meticulously maintained to ensure a smooth, confident driving experience. The exterior retains a vibrant finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible daily use, while the interior remains remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Under the hood, the engine runs strong and the transmission shifts seamlessly, a testament to its regular service history and preventative care. Equipped with a suite of safety features and a spacious cabin, this car offers exceptional value for anyone seeking a dependable and stylish ride that is ready for the road immediately.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with exceptional value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar exemplifies our commitment to rigorous quality standards.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable mechanical and aesthetic order, it stands as a testament to responsible ownership. We invite you to experience a drive that prioritizes both reliability and sophistication.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride and it’s honestly such a gem. It’s in really great shape, super reliable, and has been taken care of so well over the years. It drives like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take it on its next adventure. If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that’s ready to go, you've found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This E46 M3 showcases the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering with its S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable performance. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous metallic shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean, featuring supple leather upholstery, a smoke-free environment, and fully functional tech features including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, providing a smooth, quiet ride and confident handling. With a comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance completed, this car is turn-key and ready for its next owner to enjoy for miles to come.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a superb balance of performance and long-term reliability. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical excellence and aesthetic refinement, this motorcar offers an elevated driving experience for the discerning professional. It represents a premier acquisition for those seeking uncompromising quality and proven durability at a sophisticated value point.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been subjected to a comprehensive professional inspection, ensuring all systems perform to a high standard of excellence. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this remains an exceptional acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a balance of luxury and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for this reliable beauty. It’s been such a fantastic car for me and is still running like a champ! It’s in really solid shape and is totally ready for all your upcoming adventures. Whether you’re just heading to work or hitting the open road for a weekend getaway, this ride has got you covered. Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a reinforced rear subframe and updated VANOS seals to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers for neutral handling characteristics. While the exterior shows minor road patina, the mechanical integrity is robust, featuring upgraded cross-drilled rotors and Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires for superior thermal management and longitudinal grip. A mechanically sound, high-performance machine ready for the tarmac.
Used vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Runs and drives well. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and refined comfort. The exterior finish remains vibrant and deep, showing only minor, expected signs of road use that do not detract from its overall sharp appearance. Inside, you will find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of operational electronics, including responsive climate control and a premium audio system. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; the engine delivers smooth power, the transmission shifts effortlessly, and it has a documented history of consistent, preventative maintenance. This is a dependable, turn-key daily driver that provides a confident and quiet ride for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic integrity. Offering a seamless blend of executive presence and proven durability, this vehicle represents a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.
